title: trasus glaucus
intro: Trasus glaucus, also known as the Blue Chaste Tree, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Trasus glaucus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Trasus glaucus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support women's health and alleviate various health issues.
